summary.roaiStatus: ROAI 2025 national, ROAI 2026 national, and 2025-2026 Lot imported from official Nitro pages, ranking PDFs, and judge standings.
summary.nationalCoverageScope: National finals, Lot, and international results.

sourceStatuses.title: ONIA 2026 national + Lot
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported from the official ONIA national JSON, LotNational identity list, and platform final leaderboards for the two Lot rounds.

sourceStatuses.title: ONIA International results 2024-2025
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported from official international scoreboards where available, with the ONIA Hall of Fame preserving medal context.

sourceStatuses.title: IAIO 2024 official results
sourceStatuses.detail: Place and score imported from the official IAIO 2024 scoreboard.

sourceStatuses.title: ROAI 2026
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported from the official ROAI 2026 task/results pages, national final PDFs, Lot IAIO/CEOAI ranking PDFs, and Nitro judge standings for national scores.

sourceStatuses.title: ROAI 2025 Lot
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported from the official ROAI 2025 Lot task/results page and final IOAI/IAIO ranking PDFs.

sourceStatuses.title: ROAI 2025 national
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported from the official ROAI 2025 ONIA task/results page, using the Clasamente Finale PDFs split by class and the Nitro complete judge leaderboard for cumulative scores.

sourceStatuses.title: ONIA 2026 mlcompete usernames
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported public final leaderboard usernames from ONIA 2026 national and Lot mlcompete pages; profile pairings are added only when they match a known real name without ambiguity.

sourceStatuses.title: ROAI judge usernames
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported final leaderboard usernames from ROAI 2025 and 2026 national stage; Added only where there was no ambiguity.
